Articles

Guides

kagiPro Quickstart Guide
Agent Quick Index
API Contracts
kagiPro Corpus Workflow: Search to Abstract-Linked Corpus
kagiPro Search Endpoint Guide

kagiPro Summarize Endpoint Guide
kagiPro FastGPT Endpoint Guide

Skills

Skills Index
Skill: Maintainer Workflow

Use this skill when changing kagiPro internals, tests, docs, release metadata, or endpoint behavior. Covers design principles, naming principles, testing with vcr, and release hygiene.

Skill: Maintainer Release Sync

Use this skill before release/PR merge to synchronize versioning, changelog, design docs, vignettes, README, and skills with implemented behavior.

Skill: Maintainer Corpus Pipeline

Use this skill when changing content download, markdown extraction, abstract generation, summarizer providers, or corpus-read linking behavior.

Skill: User Search

Use this skill for kagiPro Search endpoint workflows, including query construction, batch execution, error_mode selection, and parquet conversion.

Skill: User Enrich

Use this skill for kagiPro Enrich endpoint workflows across web and news, including batch execution, error handling, and parquet conversion.

Skill: User Summarize

Use this skill for kagiPro Summarize endpoint workflows, including URL/text query modes, graceful handling of short-input failures, and parquet conversion.

Skill: User Fastgpt

Use this skill for kagiPro FastGPT endpoint workflows, including prompt query sets, batch execution, error-mode strategy, and parquet conversion.

Skill: User Corpus Workflow

Use this skill for the end-to-end corpus pipeline in kagiPro: search results to parquet, content download, markdown extraction, abstract generation, and corpus reading with optional abstract linking.

On this page
